certificate.moduleName: Juniper Networks PTX1000 Packet Transport Router
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in Approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11 of the Security Policy. No assurance of minimum security of SSPs (e.g., keys, bit strings) that are externally loaded, or of SSPs established with externally loaded SSPs.
certificate.description: The cryptographic module provides for an encrypted connection, using SSH, between the management station and the module. The cryptographic module also provides for an encrypted connection, using MACsec, between devices.
